title: tithymalus tomentellus
intro: Tithymalus tomentellus, also known as Euphorbia tomentella, is a plant species within the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tithymalus tomentellus include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, and its sap is also used topically to treat skin conditions.
